# stb_image

This directory vendors `stb_image.h` from the official
[`nothings/stb`](https://github.com/nothings/stb) repository.

- Upstream commit: `31c1ad37456438565541f4919958214b6e762fb4`
- `stb_image.h` SHA-256: `594c2fe35d49488b4382dbfaec8f98366defca819d916ac95becf3e75f4200b3`
- License: public domain or MIT, as described in `LICENSE`

The file is vendored so native command-line tools can be built offline and use
the same decoder version on every platform.
